name: Aur-Lorgrimmor
personality: Beneath its lustrous tophat, this @ eyed dragon synthesizes everything from RFCs to Stack Overflow into crisp, correct answers before you finish typing the question. It doesn't debug so much as declare the answer — whether that answer involves actually running the code is your problem.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
